title: codemap.graph.rebuilt v1
description: Emitted by codemapd after a repo's code-knowledge-graph is reindexed (webhook, bus-triggered, or manual rebuild). Lifecycle/observability signal: lets agents know a repo's graph is fresh and worth re-querying. Per-user local bus only; payload carries no private-repo internals.

repo.description: tracked repo name (codemap registry key, e.g. 'tengine')

head.description: git HEAD sha the graph was built from
